archived_trends.name: Dubai as a Competitive Tax Jurisdiction
archived_trends.summary: Dubai offers a 9% corporate tax rate, with 0% rates in Free Zones, and allows for 100% foreign ownership, positioning itself as a business-friendly hub.
archived_trends.evidence: Dubai has a 9% corporate tax, with 0% rate in Free Zones.

archived_trends.name: Austria's Income Tax Reduction
archived_trends.summary: Austria is planning to reduce its top income tax rate from 55% to 50% in 2026, potentially impacting labor markets and investment.
archived_trends.evidence: Austria is planning to eliminate its highest tax bracket in 2026.

archived_trends.name: Corporate Tax Rate Adjustments - Austria
